data.body: CHECKPOINT 4/6: Implementation complete ✓ — Updated CONFIGURATION-REFERENCE.md: (1) stack: added ruby-rails/ruby-jekyll/unknown to accepted values and onboarding write note; (2) ci.fast_gate_job/fast_fail_job/test_ceil_job: added onboarding Phase 3 Step 2b provenance; (3) ci.integration_workflow: added confidence-gated selection UX, ci.workflow_name vs ci.integration_workflow distinction, and onboarding provenance; (4) version.file_path: added numbered multi-value selection UX and onboarding provenance; (5) updated last_synced_commit frontmatter to cae021ba
